info.title: Interaone API Documentation

get.summary: Get detailed information for a specific organization

post.summary: Ingest a batch of AI call observability events (agent internal)
post.description: Receives batched AICallEvent records from the agent's observability worker and bulk-inserts them into MongoDB. Protected by the shared x-ai-tool-secret header — no JWT required.

401.description: Unauthorized (missing or invalid AI tool secret)
